creator: jonhohle@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 238478
ditaa-0.11.0-patch

ditaa 0.11.0 patch

Update graphics/ditaa to version 0.11.0.

Ditaa maintenance has been moved to GitHub[0] and packaging has changed a bit.

In addition to the version bump and related changes, Ditaa has also been relicensed from GPL2 to LGPL3.

The wrapper shell script has been updated to `exec` the java process and pass arguments as they are sent to the script.

Tested locally as well as with portlint and poudriere.

0 - https://github.com/stathissideris/ditaa/releases/tag/v0.11.0
